tag.create: INSERT INTO tags (owner_id, name, color) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id, owner_id, name, color, created_at;
tag.getByIdForOwner: SELECT id, owner_id, name, color, created_at FROM tags WHERE id = $1 AND owner_id = $2 LIMIT 1;
tag.getById: SELECT id, owner_id, name, color, created_at FROM tags WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;
tag.listForOwner: SELECT id, owner_id, name, color, created_at FROM tags WHERE owner_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3;
tag.countForOwner: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM tags WHERE owner_id = $1;
tag.updateForOwner: UPDATE tags SET name = COALESCE($3, name), color = COALESCE($4, color) WHERE id = $1 AND owner_id = $2 RETURNING id, owner_id, name, color, created_at;
tag.deleteForOwner: DELETE FROM tags WHERE id = $1 AND owner_id = $2;
taskTag.add: INSERT INTO task_tags (task_id, tag_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (task_id, tag_id) DO NOTHING;
taskTag.remove: DELETE FROM task_tags WHERE task_id = $1 AND tag_id = $2;
taskTag.exists: SELECT 1 FROM task_tags WHERE task_id = $1 AND tag_id = $2 LIMIT 1;
taskTag.listTagsForTaskAndOwner: SELECT t.id, t.owner_id, t.name, t.color, t.created_at FROM task_tags tt JOIN tags t ON t.id = tt.tag_id WHERE tt.task_id = $1 AND t.owner_id = $2 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC;
